_notes: Luzern studios use Eversports, SportsNow, Fitogram, and MindBody widgets. Data from web search snippets. Mii-Ruum and LIV lab had some searchable class data. Yogastudio Luzern and Original Hot Yoga schedules are primarily in dynamic widgets.
